label: Distance to area feature
definition: Distance in meters to the nearest NHD area feature. (Result column: dist_area_m.)

label: Distance to coastline
definition: Distance in meters to the nearest coastline (99999 for inland addresses). (Result column: dist_coast_m.)

label: Distance to flowline
definition: Distance in meters to the nearest NHD flowline. (Result column: dist_flow_m.)

label: Distance to nearest blue feature
definition: Distance in meters to the nearest combined blue feature (flowline, waterbody, area, or coast). (Result column: dist_blue_m.)

label: Distance to waterbody
definition: Distance in meters to the nearest NHD waterbody. (Result column: dist_water_m.)
